title: vaccinium littoreum
intro: Vaccinium littoreum, also known as the coastal blueberry or littorella blueberry, is a small, low-growing shrub native to the coastal regions of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial compounds that have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Vaccinium littoreum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, while also exhibiting antiviral and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
